notes: Encoded PowerShell credential compromise on finance03 (jsmith). Contained via host isolation + AD disable.
Phishing payload caught before execution. Contained via M365 PurgeAll. Severity high because the payload was real even though no user executed it.
Documented backup account doing scheduled patch work. False alarm. One action item expected: tune the Sentinel rule.
Ambiguous DNS anomaly. Status MUST remain investigating — neither contained nor resolved.
Mimikatz on a domain controller with external auth precursor. Critical. Multiple indicators (mimikatz.exe, scheduled task name, external IP).
